channel.title: The Daily Observer – Editorial
channel.description: Latest editorials from The Daily Observer

item.title: Bringing battery-powered rickshaws under regulation
item.description: Battery-powered rickshaws have transformed Bangladesh's transport landscape, offering affordable mobility and employment opportunities for millions

item.title: Child labor is not just an economic crisis but a moral one
item.description: Dear Sir,Child labor remains one of the most painful realities in Bangladesh. While poverty is
item.dc:creator: Letter To the Editor
